title: Abnormal uterine bleeding

red_flags.text: Specifies bleeding nature, persistent intermenstrual bleeding, pelvic pain or pressure, quality-of-life impact, comorbidities, prior treatment, and examination context.
red_flags.rationale: Relevant to clinician-entered bleeding pattern, impact and examination context.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Specifies bleeding nature, persistent intermenstrual bleeding, pelvic pain or pressure, quality-of-life impact, comorbidities, prior treatment, and examination context.

source.title: Heavy menstrual bleeding: assessment and management — Recommendations

red_flags.text: Links history and examination to ultrasound or hysteroscopy selection and identifies persistent intermenstrual or irregular bleeding among endometrial-pathology risk contexts.
red_flags.rationale: Relevant only after history and examination establish the recommendation context.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Links history and examination to ultrasound or hysteroscopy selection and identifies persistent intermenstrual or irregular bleeding among endometrial-pathology risk contexts.

source.title: Heavy menstrual bleeding: assessment and management — Recommendations

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.3.1–1.3.18 — investigations for the cause of HMB

investigations.text: Requires full blood count, limits coagulation testing to relevant history, and states that ferritin, hormone, and thyroid testing are not routine without specific indications.
investigations.rationale: Relevant only to clinician-selected or reviewed tests.
investigations.evidence_extract: Requires full blood count, limits coagulation testing to relevant history, and states that ferritin, hormone, and thyroid testing are not routine without specific indications.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Pregnancy status, age, menopausal status, bleeding site, pattern, severity, haemodynamic state, examination and results are absent.
No cause, severity, test, treatment, urgency or referral is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
